verification.method: Open this manifest with a cache-busting query parameter and compare buildId plus sourceCommit with the deployed page readout.
verification.cachePolicy: The page fetches this file with cache: no-store and a cacheBust query parameter.
verification.sourceCommitPolicy: sourceCommit points to the final functional v0.27.2 commit containing the unified labor cost model, optimized runtime settlement, locked day-30 fingerprint and world-save app version; later README, roadmap, CODEX and manifest commits may follow it.
